meta.description: SSA dataset freshness / TTL policy used by scrapers, Dexie hydration, guards, and background shims.

weather.current.notes: Used by weatherGuard and planning UI. Keep tight TTL for current conditions.

weather.forecast.hourly.notes: Short-range hourly forecast for next 24–48h. Good enough within 1 hour.

weather.forecast.daily.notes: Multi-day forecast used by garden/animals/preservation planners.

pricing.storeItem.notes: Normalized pricebook entries (by store + item). Consider refresh if older than 3 days; hard-expire after 30 days.

pricing.promotions.circular.weekly.notes: Weekly store circulars. Fresh for one ad cycle; keep one extra week for cycle-learning.

pricing.coupons.notes: Coupon metadata (issue/expiry/terms). Frequently re-used; refresh weekly.

pricing.couponCycles.notes: Learned coupon/price cycles. Very long-lived model data.

nutrition.foodProfile.notes: Core nutrient profiles (USDA-style). Rarely change; effectively cached for months.

nutrition.brandLabel.notes: Brand-specific labels scraped/parsed from packages or websites.

inventory.householdSnapshot.notes: Derived snapshot used by planners / guards. Encourage fresh sync every 1–3 hours during use.

inventory.externalStoreStock.notes: Stock estimates scraped from external stores (when enabled).

garden.plantingGuides.notes: Static-ish guides by zone / crop. Updated only when sources change.

garden.harvestHistory.notes: User harvest logs. Never auto-expire; 0 means keep until explicit cleanup.

sessions.checkpoint.notes: SessionRunner checkpoints (running/paused sessions). Needed for auto-resume after reload; safe to prune after ~7 days.

sessions.analytics.notes: Completed session analytics. Long-lived for trend analysis; do not auto-expire.

hub.exportEnvelope.notes: Outbound envelopes for Family Fund Hub exports, including retry queues.

guards.quietHoursConfig.notes: User-configured Quiet Hours. Treated as config; never auto-expire.

guards.sabbathConfig.notes: User-configured Sabbath rules/offsets. Treated as config; never auto-expire.

guards.deviceBatteryProfile.notes: Optional learned battery behavior profile for device-level guard decisions.
